entry.title: Protocol for zero-conf transactions
entry.summary: The email briefly mentions a scholarly article that may be relevant to the conversation. The sender notes that they have not read the full piece but suggests visiting the article based on the similarity of its title to the topic under discussion. For those interested in further reading, the article can be accessed at [Springer Link](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10207-018-0422-4). This reference could provide additional insights or data pertinent to the subject matter being discussed.
